title: FATHERS & DAUGHTERS
overview: Memempu is a Worker in the underground city of Pinyin, but dreams of becoming a Marker and going off to explore the wild tunnels known as the Labyrinth. On the night of a festival, the Marker duo Walsh and his daugher Lynda return, and Memempu receives a surprising gift. Will she finally be allowed to pursue her dream?

title: GOOD DAY, GOOD BYE
overview: Memempu deciphers the pendant sent by Urorop, revealing it to be a detailed map of the Labyrinth. But before she can head out, a kaiju attacks Pinyin. Her father Gagumber activates a bot he's hidden in the warehouse district, and they face down against the kaiju together.

title: BRAINS & HEARTS
overview: Memempu finally reaches the Labyrinth and wants to take the shortest route to their goal, but Gagumber continues to shoot down her suggestions. Their bickering only stops when a kaiju attack leaves them separated.

title: LADIES & GENTLEMEN
overview: Gagumber and Memempu are arrested in the colony of Jolly-Jolly. They're allowed out for sightseeing while their punishment is determined, but a chance encounter with a woman named Zackletu leads them to bigger trouble!

title: NO WORK, NO LIFE
overview: Meroro takes Memempu and Gagumber to "Windy Hill" Labyrinth, a once-green forest that is beginning to decay. Can Memempu fix the mechanisms causing the Labyrinth's recent climate abnormalities?

title: JUSTICE FOR VILLAINS
overview: Memempu and Gagumber are free once more... until they're caught by the Yuri team, a gang of young miscreants based in the Colony of AreYaar. The kids take them back to their home base and teach them the secret behind the Colony's supposed equality!

title: ON THE ROAD
overview: Memempu, Gagumber, Zackletu, and Yuri have teamed up for their journey, but one night Memempu gets sick and has a terrifying nightmare. After that, the grown-ups just seem to act more and more strangely...

title: MEMORIES & REGRETS
overview: The team visits the Calacalla Colony to get Yuri treatment. During the downtime, Gagumber runs into an old friend, and Memempu tells Zackletu about her dream...

title: END OF VACATION
overview: The jungle heat in the Labyrinth makes things hard going for Team Memempu. But it gets even worse when a sudden downpour leads to flooding that sweeps them away to an isolated island!

title: OH MY TONY
overview: After saving the team, Merooro explains further about the natural disasters plaguing the Labyrinth. Gagumber feels threatened by Memempu's growing respect for the bureaucrat.

title: SOUND OF DREAM
overview: Merooro brings Team Memempu to Dream Colony to reward them for their aid against Shibito. But a night that should feature a performance from the Colony's foremost diva turns into a farce when the girl escapes her handlers and goes on the run!

title: TO BE CONTINUED
overview: Memempu is captured by a Shibito girl who refers to her as a "rainbow child." What do those words mean? And can Gagumber save her before something terrible happens?!
